message:
Command `# NC_UART v1.7.1 has different RTL structure - check what's actually there
ls /nc/ip/NC_UART/v1.7.1/rtl/ 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
find /nc/ip/NC_UART/v1.7.1/rtl/ -name "nc_fifo.v" -o -name "nc_glitch_filter.v" -o -name "nc_ticker.v" 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# NC_UART v1.7.1 has different RTL structure - check what's actually there
ls /nc/ip/NC_UART/v1.7.1/rtl/ 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
find /nc/ip/NC_UART/v1.7.1/rtl/ -name "nc_fifo.v" -o -name "nc_glitch_filter.v" -o -name "nc_ticker.v" 2>/dev/null"}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# NC_UART v1.7.1 has different RTL structure - check what's actually there
ls /nc/ip/NC_UART/v1.7.1/rtl/ 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
find /nc/ip/NC_UART/v1.7.1/rtl/ -name "nc_fifo.v" -o -name "nc_glitch_filter.v" -o -name "nc_ticker.v" 2>/dev/null
